title: Fix RawFileSlice idx and tags in lexer_test
body: While running the lexer test in rust mode, these RawFileSlice tags came across with type errors. This fixes the order of the block_idx and tag.

step_plan.summary: Introduce a defensive __new__ shim for RawFileSlice to allow the 4th positional argument to be interpreted as either block_idx (int) or tag (str), resolving type errors in lexer_test without altering existing call sites.

steps.reason: To tolerate the 4th positional argument being either a block_idx (int) or a tag (str) and preserve existing positional call sites while fixing type errors observed in lexer_test when run in Rust mode.
steps.side_effects: Tests that pass a block_idx in the 4th slot continue to work; tests that pass a tag in the 4th slot now construct correctly without type errors. Downstream usage of RawFileSlice.block_idx and RawFileSlice.tag remains compatible. Minimal API impact; may require minor type-hint adjustments or doc updates. Validate by running the lexer tests in Rust mode and ensuring no regressions in related templaters.
